item.description:
# CodexMate 0.0.1
- Added the first CodexMate macOS menu bar release for monitoring Codex Desktop thread activity. - Added recent thread listing with deep links back into Codex Desktop. - Added a settings window with language, global shortcut, notifications, launch at login, and update controls. - Added packaged `.app` builds with Sparkle update support. - Added release packaging, notarization, and Sparkle appcast generation scripts.
